summary: Plan-mode live PR inventory classification only. No GitHub mutations are planned; each listed open PR is kept open because the shard has no shared canonical, no security-sensitive hydrated item, and no PR is boringly duplicate, superseded, abandoned, or low-signal under the job policy.
